---
title: data.diabetes.get_diabetes_dataloaders
---



```python
data.diabetes.get_diabetes_dataloaders(
    test_size=0.2,
    batch_size=32,
    scale_features=True,
    shuffle_train=True,
    shuffle_test=False,
    random_state=42,
    num_workers=0,
    pin_memory=False,
)
```

Returns train and test dataloaders for the Diabetes dataset.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name           | Type             | Description                                                                               | Default   |
|----------------|------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------|
| test_size      | [float](`float`) | Fraction of data to use for testing.                                                      | `0.2`     |
| batch_size     | [int](`int`)     | Batch size.                                                                               | `32`      |
| scale_features | [bool](`bool`)   | Whether to standardize features using StandardScaler.                                     | `True`    |
| shuffle_train  | [bool](`bool`)   | Whether to shuffle the training data.                                                     | `True`    |
| shuffle_test   | [bool](`bool`)   | Whether to shuffle the test data.                                                         | `False`   |
| random_state   | [int](`int`)     | Random seed for splitting.                                                                | `42`      |
| num_workers    | [int](`int`)     | Number of subprocesses to use for data loading.                                           | `0`       |
| pin_memory     | [bool](`bool`)   | If True, the data loader will copy Tensors into CUDA pinned memory before returning them. | `False`   |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type                                                                                                                                                                                                           | Description                                                                                                        |
|--------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| tuple  | [Tuple](`typing.Tuple`)\[[DataLoader](`torch.utils.data.DataLoader`), [DataLoader](`torch.utils.data.DataLoader`), [Optional](`typing.Optional`)\[[StandardScaler](`sklearn.preprocessing.StandardScaler`)\]\] | (train_loader, test_loader, scaler) scaler is the StandardScaler implementation if scale_features=True, else None. |

## Examples {.doc-section .doc-section-examples}


::: {#a05eaa4d .cell execution_count=1}
``` {.python .cell-code}
from spotoptim.data.diabetes import get_diabetes_dataloaders

train_loader, test_loader, scaler = get_diabetes_dataloaders()
print(train_loader)
print(test_loader)
print(scaler)
```
